conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's great. So, what's been going on this week? Any big changes or stressors?
Not really. Just the usual stuff at work. Trying to get some claims settled before the deadline.
I see. How's your job as an insurance adjuster treating you lately?
It's...fine. Just trying to keep up with the workload, you know? Feels like there's never enough hours in the day.
I understand that feeling. Can you tell me a bit more about what's been going on at work that's causing some stress for you?
Honestly, it's just the constant pressure to meet these crazy deadlines. And when I don't, my boss gets on my case.
Okay, I see. That sounds frustrating. How do you usually take care of yourself outside of work? Do you have any hobbies or interests that bring you joy?
Well...I used to like hiking, but lately, even that's felt like too much effort. And with all the changes going on at work, it's hard to find time for anything else.
I'm so sorry to hear that. It sounds like your energy levels have been pretty low lately.
Yeah...I just don't feel like doing much of anything anymore. And when I do, it feels like I crash and burn after a few hours.
That sounds really tough. Can you tell me more about what's going on with your appetite? Are you eating well?
Honestly, I've been having some trouble sleeping too...not that I'm complaining or anything! But yeah, my stomach's always growling, and I find myself snacking on junk food just to keep going.
Okay, got it. So, sleep's not really an issue for you. That's a good thing!
Yeah, no complaints there. Although...it would be nice to have some consistent energy levels again. You know?
Of course! Let's explore that more. What are some things you usually do to try and boost your energy when you're feeling low?
Honestly, not much. I mean, I used to love exercise, but lately, even going for a walk feels like too much effort.
That makes sense. It sounds like motivation's been really hard to come by lately.
Yeah...and it's not just the physical stuff either. Emotionally, I feel like I'm just stuck in this funk all the time.
Can you tell me more about what's going on emotionally? What are some of the feelings you're experiencing?
Honestly...I just feel guilty a lot of the time. Like, I should be doing better at work or with my relationships...
Okay, got it. So, guilt's been playing a big role in how you've been feeling.
Yeah...and it's hard to shake off. It's like, even when I'm trying to have fun or relax, this nagging feeling is always there in the back of my mind.
That sounds really tough. Can you think of any specific situations or people that might be contributing to these feelings?
Well...there was a big change at work recently, and it's been hard to adjust...
Okay, let's explore that more. What's been going on at work that's causing this guilt?
Just the way things have changed since the new manager started...it feels like I'm not really valued or respected anymore.
That sounds really frustrating. How are your relationships with friends and family doing during all of this?
Honestly, they're kind of suffering too. I just don't know how to balance everything anymore...
Okay, let's talk more about what's going on in those relationships. What changes have you noticed?
Well...my girlfriend's been getting really frustrated with me lately. She says I'm distant and withdrawn all the time.
Okay, that sounds tough. How do you feel about your relationship right now?
Honestly, it feels like we're just going through the motions at this point...
Can you think of any specific changes or conversations that might have triggered this feeling in you?
Yeah...we had a big fight recently over some stupid thing, and it just made things worse.
Okay, let's explore what happened during that fight. What did you say to each other?
Honestly, I don't even remember what we were fighting about anymore. It was just this general feeling of frustration and resentment...
That sounds really tough. Have you talked to your girlfriend about how you're feeling?
Yeah...I mean, not really. I just feel like she wouldn't understand or care...
Okay, let's work on that. Can we make a plan for you to have an open and honest conversation with her about what's going on?
Honestly, that scares me. But maybe it's time to try something different...
That's the spirit! We can work on some strategies together to help you approach this conversation. How do you feel about that?
Yeah...I guess it couldn't hurt to try.
Absolutely! Let's take things one step at a time and work through this process together, okay?
Okay.
